summary: Implemented issue #54 benchmark dynamics instrumentation, verified locally and in CI, opened and merged PR #62.

issueReview.title: Instrument criticality and neuromodulator dynamics in benchmarks

implementationChecklist: Capture per-step activity, energy, trinary state distribution and neuromodulator levels during benchmark runs.
Add criticality proxies: activity variance, transition entropy, neutral-state occupancy and branching/activity propagation ratio.
Track whether modulation changes later decisions via a deterministic modulation-effect probe.
Export plots and CSV artifacts under benchmarks/results/analysis/.
Avoid modifying vendored upstream Neuraxon code.
implemented: Added deterministic dynamics sampling and criticality metrics to tissue benchmark results.
Added modulation-effect tracking for action changes and confidence shifts.
Added analysis exports: dynamics_metrics.csv, criticality_summary.csv and activity_energy_trends.png.
Updated benchmark report output and tests to cover the new dynamics artifacts and regime classification.
No vendored upstream Neuraxon code was modified.

verification.command: uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_tissue_benchmark.py tests/test_benchmark_report.py tests/test_benchmark_analysis.py

uv run --extra dev ruff check src/neuraxon_agent/tissue_benchmark.py src/neuraxon_agent/benchmark_analysis.py tests/test_tissue_benchmark.py tests/test_benchmark_report.py tests/test_benchmark_analysis.py

verification.result: Success: no issues found in 1 source file
